allow: Bash(bash -c "ls ~/.claude/sessions/ 2>/dev/null | head -10; echo ---; find ~/.claude/ -name *session* -o -name *resume* 2>/dev/null | head -10; echo ---; cat ~/.claude/settings.json 2>/dev/null | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | head -80; echo ---; find ~/.claude/ -name hooks* 2>/dev/null; echo ---; cat ~/.claude/hooks.json 2>/dev/null; echo ---; ls ~/.claude/projects/-mnt-c-dev-enterprise-pm-platform/memory/ 2>/dev/null; echo ---; cat ~/.claude/projects/-mnt-c-dev-enterprise-pm-platform/memory/MEMORY.md 2>/dev/null; echo ---; cat ~/.claude/keybindings.json 2>/dev/null; echo ---; claude --help 2>/dev/null | head -60; echo ---; find ~/.claude/ -name commands -type d 2>/dev/null; echo ---; ls ~/.claude/commands/ 2>/dev/null; echo ---; find /mnt/c/dev/ -maxdepth 3 -name *nim* -o -name *proxy* 2>/dev/null | head -10; echo ---; env | grep -i nim 2>/dev/null | sed 's/=.*/=<SET>/'")

Bash(bash -c 'claude --version 2>/dev/null || echo "not found"; env | grep -iE '\\''anthropic|claude|nim|proxy|base_url|model'\\'' | sed '\\''s/=.*/=<SET>/'\\''; wslpath -w /mnt/c/dev 2>/dev/null; echo ---; cat /proc/version 2>/dev/null | head -1; echo ---; echo HOME=/home/bathina; echo PWD=__CMDSUB_OUTPUT__; node --version; python3 --version 2>/dev/null || echo "python3: not found"; gh --version 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo "gh: not found"; cat ~/.claude/settings.json 2>/dev/null | head -50; echo ---LOCAL---; cat /mnt/c/dev/enterprise-pm-platform/.claude/settings.local.json 2>/dev/null | head -50; echo ---CLAUDE.md \(project\)---; cat /mnt/c/dev/enterprise-pm-platform/CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null; echo ---CLAUDE.md \(global\)---; cat ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null')

Bash(bash -c '
echo "=== CLAUDE CODE VERSION ==="
claude --version 2>/dev/null || echo "not found"
echo
echo "=== ENV VARS ==="
env | grep -iE "anthropic|claude|nim|proxy|base_url|model" | sed "s/=.*/=<SET>/"
echo
echo "=== WSL PATH MAPPINGS ==="
wslpath -w /mnt/c/dev 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
head -1 /proc/version 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
echo "HOME=$HOME"
echo "PWD=$\(pwd\)"
echo
echo "=== NODE VERSION ==="
node --version 2>/dev/null || echo "node: not found"
echo
echo "=== PYTHON VERSION ==="
python3 --version 2>/dev/null || echo "python3: not found"
echo
echo "=== GH CLI VERSION ==="
gh --version 2>/dev/null | head -1 || echo "gh: not found"
echo
echo "=== SETTINGS.JSON HEAD ==="
head -50 "$HOME/.claude/settings.json" 2>/dev/null || echo "settings.json not found"
echo "---LOCAL---"
head -50 "/mnt/c/dev/enterprise-pm-platform/.claude/settings.local.json" 2>/dev/null || echo "settings.local.json not found"
echo "---CLAUDE.MD \(project\)---"
head -50 "/mnt/c/dev/enterprise-pm-platform/CLAUDE.md" 2>/dev/null || echo "CLAUDE.md not found"
echo "---CLAUDE.MD \(global\)---"
head -50 "$HOME/.claude/CLAUDE.md" 2>/dev/null || echo "global CLAUDE.md not found')
Bash(bash -c 'find "$HOME/.claude/skills/" -type f -name "*.md" 2>/dev/null | sort | while IFS= read -r f; do echo "=== $f ==="; head -15 "$f"; echo; done')
